'''Ubuuga''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Ubuuga system/Legends|Ubuuga system]]<ref name="rant" /> and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Ubuugan]]s and the [[Ubuugan fleshborer]]s. Ubuuga was well-known for its [[Egg/Legends|caviar]].

{{Planet-stub}}
